justification: The diff comprehensively migrates from Java 11/Jakarta EE 8 to Java 21/Jakarta EE 10, updating all javax.* imports to jakarta.* and upgrading dependencies (Hibernate 5->6, Servlet 4->6, JPA 2.2->3.0). It correctly uses the @Serial annotation for serialVersionUID fields (Java 14+ idiom) and modernizes the maven-compiler-plugin with <release>. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific features like virtual threads or pattern matching for switch, keeping idiomatic score at 4.
